heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 410nn–4 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subchapter, but not to exceed $200,000 for planning.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the San Francisco Maritime National Historical Park Act of 1988, which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 100–348102 Stat. 654section 410nn of this titleJune 27, 1988
